productDisplayName: Ganuchi Men Casual Beige Casual Shoes
description: Designed for those who never compromise on comfort and style, this high ankle suede shoe from ganuchi is a great buy. Slip into it barefoot and pair it with capris and stylish t-shirts for unparalleled cool.UpperSuede upper with stitch detailing on the midfoot Fabric inner lining for breathable comfortLace-up system for a snug, customised FitSynthetic leather printed footbed for all-day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with herringbone pattern grooves on the forefoot and backfoot Shoe careRemove dust and dirt using a suede brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
